reason: Development analysis completed trade calculations but stopped before writing the evidence summary because the cooldown-matched scheduled-long diagnostic naturally has global NO_ACTION weeks while the comparison helper incorrectly required a trade on every main entry date. Frozen semantics require those diagnostic baseline NO_ACTION dates to remain cash, while MOM14 and no-cooldown market baselines still require exact date coverage.
changes: Allow only an explicitly requested diagnostic comparison to fill baseline NO_ACTION dates as zero cash return.
Record the count of cash-filled diagnostic dates in the comparison output.
Keep MOM14 and market baseline comparisons strict; do not change signals, trades, costs, gates or any primary economic rule.
